identity.description: A dark action RPG with pixel art style where a nun fights cursed monsters in a decadent world.

screenshots.description: Main key art showing the protagonist Sister Lelia.
Sister Lelia in a dark dungeon environment, demonstrating the pixel art combat.
Gameplay UI showing health, magic, and inventory.

mechanics.coreLoop: Combat, exploration of 6 decadent dungeons, leveling up, and collecting Relics to enhance stats.

systems.name: Combat & Magic
systems.description: Melee attacks and magic (Arrow/Sword magic) using MP. Includes headshot mechanics.
systems.reason: MP management and damage optimization are key for surviving difficult bosses.

systems.name: Enemy & Item Database
systems.description: 6 dungeons filled with unique monsters and hidden items/Relics.
systems.reason: Players need a checklist for items and info on enemy patterns/drops.

systems.name: Impurity & Status Effects
systems.description: A complex system of status effects (impurity, pregnancy, etc.) that affect gameplay.
systems.reason: Visualizing status effects and their impacts could be useful for advanced players.

recommendation.competitiveEdge: Detailed interactive database for items and enemy weaknesses with high-quality pixel art previews.

gaps.reason: No public Trello board found for this Steam indie game.
